sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33078" key="e)/ktrhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκ-τρημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n33078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hole made in trepanning</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:11:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.11.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
